---
# Location-timeline exhibit. Google Maps Timeline place visits
# export, grouped by date. Each entry shows place name, address,
# arrival/departure times, and an optional confidence label.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-location-timeline.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is an extract of the Google Maps Timeline (Your Places
  / Your Timeline) for the Subject Account covering the three
  days surrounding the incident.

exhibit-type: location-timeline
exhibit-title: "Google Maps Timeline -- Place Visits"
exhibit-device: "Subject Account 104871329500981 -- Samsung Galaxy S9+"

# Records live in a separate YAML data file because Pandoc's typst
# metadata writer drops the dict contents for this record schema.
exhibit-records-file: "data/exhibit-location-timeline-records.yaml"
---
